shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The HUD uses dark slate panels, cream text space, and gold separators.
differences: The bar spans the full 1920px width and reserves slots for all live metrics.
Left and right ends use softened mud brackets that tie the interface back to the farm setting.
Gold separators and teal icon wells keep live metrics readable over the board.

context.usage: Persistent top interface that displays balance status, stage goal, timer, and resources.

specs.shading: Flat panel fill with a cream upper ridge.

acceptance_criteria: HUD plate size is exactly 1920x96px and leaves at least 24px of inner padding around every metric slot.
Gold separators remain visible against both dark slate and cream zones.
The balance slot is easy to find within one second of play start.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle root with child text and icon widgets.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_hud_balance_topbar_1920x96.png during the Loading state and pair it with font handles for dynamic labels.
runtime_notes: Keep the HUD in screen space.
Snap panel bounds to integer coordinates.
Expose anchors for balance, goal, timer, and currency nodes.
